title: Choose a viable PR head for issue 383
context: The requested current branch is main, the PR base is also main, and GitHub cannot open a PR with identical head and base. No HLasani/paqad-ai fork exists. Two verified commits are local and unpushed.

options.label: Allow one issue branch in Eliyce/paqad-ai
Create HLasani/paqad-ai and use its main branch
Keep the commits local and stop before PR

rationale: User authorized creating one issue branch so GitHub can open the PR.
